patches.summary: Add the cookie auth env var to the MCPB user configuration.
patches.reason: The manifest declared only debug and OS-path settings, so the MCPB manifest verifier rejected the package even though the CLI requires FACEBOOK_MARKET_COOKIES for browser-session auth.

patches.summary: Resolve review findings in auth probing, local state paths, title casing, browser-session proof validation, and watch matching.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged a macOS-only state path, fragile SQL construction, deprecated title casing, duplicated browser-session proof parsing, stubbed LLM relevance labeling, zero-price min-filter behavior, and the matches --new lifecycle before publish readiness.
patches.validated_outcome: go fmt ./..., go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., and printing-press publish validate all passed.

patches.summary: Replace read-mostly positioning with write-gated seller workflow wording.
patches.reason: The package supports write-gated listing creation, photo upload, and seller replies, so the prior read-mostly headline understated the publish/sell workflow.
patches.validated_outcome: gofmt on touched Go files, go test ./..., verify_manifest.py, and verify_publish_package.py passed.

patches.summary: Tighten write-gate API status matching and restrict HTTP cache permissions.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged that an unreachable API status contained the reachable substring and that cached Marketplace responses were world-readable on multi-user systems.
patches.validated_outcome: gofmt on touched Go files, go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., verify_manifest.py, and verify_publish_package.py passed.

patches.summary: Report only newly inserted watch matches from watch run.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged that INSERT OR IGNORE skipped duplicates while the JSON matches count still incremented unconditionally.
patches.validated_outcome: gofmt on touched Go files, go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build ./..., verify_manifest.py, and verify_publish_package.py passed.

patches.summary: Emit empty JSON arrays for empty watches, matches, and stale listing result sets.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged that nil slices encode as JSON null, which breaks agent and script consumers that expect iterable arrays.
patches.validated_outcome: gofmt on touched Go files, go test ./..., go vet ./..., and go build ./... passed.
